name: Blue Badge Booking Approval
description: Sends confirmation or rejection emails when a booking status changes in the BlueBadgeBookings SharePoint list

inputs.subject: ✅ Blue Badge Booking Confirmed – @{triggerBody()?['BookingDate']}
inputs.body:
Dear @{triggerBody()?['ApplicantName']},

Your Blue Badge booking has been confirmed.

Date:@{formatDateTime(triggerBody()?['BookingDate'], 'dddd dd MMMM yyyy')}
Time:@{triggerBody()?['TimeSlot']?['Value']}
Service:@{triggerBody()?['ServiceType']?['Value']}
Badge Number:@{triggerBody()?['BadgeNumber']}

Please bring your Blue Badge on the day.

If you need to cancel, please do so at least 24 hours in advance via the booking app.

inputs.subject: ❌ Blue Badge Booking – Unable to Confirm
inputs.body:
Dear @{triggerBody()?['ApplicantName']},

Unfortunately we are unable to confirm your booking for @{formatDateTime(triggerBody()?['BookingDate'], 'dddd dd MMMM yyyy')} at @{triggerBody()?['TimeSlot']?['Value']}.

Reason: @{triggerBody()?['RejectionReason']}

Please use the booking app to select an alternative date or time slot, or contact us if you need assistance.

inputs.subject: Blue Badge Booking Cancelled
inputs.body: Your booking for @{formatDateTime(triggerBody()?['BookingDate'], 'dd/MM/yyyy')} at @{triggerBody()?['TimeSlot']?['Value']} has been cancelled as requested.
